# Miden Documentation

> Miden is a zero-knowledge rollup for Ethereum that enables private, scalable smart contracts using STARK proofs. Users execute and prove transactions locally (client-side proving). Privacy is the default.

- [Docs](https://docs.miden.xyz): Full documentation site
- [GitHub](https://github.com/0xMiden): Source code and repositories
- [Skills](https://docs.miden.xyz/skill.md): Agent skill file for AI assistants

## Getting Started

- [Quick Start](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/quick-start/): Installation, CLI basics, and first steps
- [Installation](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/quick-start/setup/installation): Install the Miden toolchain with midenup
- [CLI Basics](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/quick-start/setup/cli-basics): Core CLI commands for accounts, notes, and transactions
- [Your First Smart Contract](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/quick-start/your-first-smart-contract/): Create, deploy, and test a counter contract
- [Accounts](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/quick-start/accounts): Create and manage accounts
- [Notes](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/quick-start/notes): Send and receive assets with notes

## Smart Contracts (Rust SDK)

- [Overview](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/): Index page for the Miden SDK (v0.10) reference
- [What is a Miden Smart Contract](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/overview): Execution model, accounts, notes, and the transaction lifecycle
- [Toolchain & Project Structure](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/getting-started): The Miden toolchain, project layout, and how Rust source becomes a deployable .masp file

### Accounts

- [Components](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/accounts/components): Define account components with #[component] macro — storage, methods, and bindings
- [Storage](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/accounts/storage): Persistent state with Value slots and StorageMaps
- [Custom Types](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/accounts/custom-types): Export custom structs and enums with #[export_type]
- [Account Operations](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/accounts/account-operations): Query state and mutate the vault using self methods
- [Cryptography](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/accounts/cryptography): RPO256 hashing, Falcon512 signatures, BLAKE3, SHA256
- [Authentication](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/accounts/authentication): RPO-Falcon512 auth components and nonce management

### Notes

- [What are Notes](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/notes/): Programmable UTXOs for asset transfers
- [Note Scripts](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/notes/note-scripts): Write note scripts with #[note] and #[note_script] macros
- [Output Notes](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/notes/output-notes): Create output notes, attach assets, compute recipients
- [Reading Notes](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/notes/reading-notes): Read note data with active_note and input_note modules

### Transactions

- [Transaction Context](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/transactions/transaction-context): The tx module — block info, note commitments, expiration
- [Transaction Scripts](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/transactions/transaction-scripts): Write transaction scripts with #[tx_script]
- [Advice Provider](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/transactions/advice-provider): Non-deterministic data, preimages, and Falcon signatures

### Reference

- [Types](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/types): Felt, Word, Asset, AccountId, and type conversions
- [Cross-Component Calls](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/smart-contracts/cross-component-calls): Call methods across account components and from note scripts
- [API Reference (docs.rs)](https://docs.rs/miden/latest/miden/): Full Rust SDK API documentation

## Develop

- [Standard Note Types](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/develop/note-types): P2ID, P2IDE (with expiration), and SWAP (atomic exchange)
- [Tutorials](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/develop/tutorials/rust-compiler/): Rust compiler tutorials
- [Miden Bank Tutorial](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/develop/tutorials/rust-compiler/miden-bank/): Step-by-step tutorial building a bank contract

## Tools

- [Tools](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/tools/): Miden client and development tools

## Migration

- [Migration Guide](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/migration/): Guide for migrating between Miden versions

## Core Concepts & Architecture

- [Core Concepts](https://docs.miden.xyz/core-concepts/): Protocol internals and architecture documentation

## Resources

- [FAQ](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/faq): Frequently asked questions
- [Glossary](https://docs.miden.xyz/builder/glossary): Terminology reference

## Optional

- [Miden Base (GitHub)](https://github.com/0xMiden/miden-base): Protocol implementation
- [Miden VM (GitHub)](https://github.com/0xMiden/miden-vm): Virtual machine
- [Miden Client (GitHub)](https://github.com/0xMiden/miden-client): Client library
- [Compiler (GitHub)](https://github.com/0xMiden/compiler): Rust-to-MASM compiler
